title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech is launching a 5-day intensive "Vibe Coding AI Agents" course in partnership with Kaggle. The course teaches how to build autonomous agents using natural language, with topics covering vibe coding workflows, agent integrations, and a capstone farming simulation project called Kaggriculture.
